per_criterion_scores.internal_note: The student identified a major issue related to static traffic assumptions but missed other calculation-related errors.
The student did not evaluate the feasibility of the solution with respect to all constraints, missing issues related to fuel efficiency and time windows.
The student did not assess the optimality of the solution, particularly in relation to non-linear constraints and overlapping time windows.

justification: The student missed critical aspects in feasibility validation and optimality assessment, showing insufficient understanding of key issues.
